title: Workload Widget - Colour change or notification warning
excerpt: It would be helpful if by 80% the circles on the widget turned yellow (indicating that the person is near full capacity) and by 100% the circles turn red. Alternatively, if there was a notification setting that when a ce…

posts.author: NCE (Natalie Costas-Evangelou)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be helpful if by 80% the circles on the widget turned yellow (indicating that the person is near full capacity) and by 100% the circles turn red. Alternatively, if there was a notification setting that when a certain % is hit for users, their line managers are notified to make them aware that members of their team are nearing full capacity/at full capacity.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @NCE,

Just want to confirm which widget you’re referring to? Is this a feature request for the platform or for the API/apps framework?

Best,
Rachel
